llm_eval.notes: owner skill run-notion-intake-publish と script validate-notion-ready.py 共に実在(dangling無)。load-bearing claim 全て実装照合一致: exit 51 停止=intake_publish_pipeline.py L130/136/150, page_id 解決順 --page-id>--page-url>notion-url.txt>notion-publish-result.json=pipeline L121-124+owner SKILL Step3 L142-144+L132 fallback, update専用/create非フォールバック=--revise+allow-create既定無効 pipeline L125-128, ready PASS時API再質問なし=owner Step2 L135+validate exit44。schema準拠主張なし(該当外)。placement正常: commands薄アダプタが Skill(run-notion-intake-publish) 経由で wrapper 起動, owner は disable-model-invocation で prompts意図的非保持, prompts/agents逆転なし。frontmatter妥当(name/description/argument-hint, 兄弟command intake/intake-revise/intake-status と責務分離整合)。実欠陥なし。軽微nit: 兄弟intake-revise.mdは allowed-tools:[Skill] 宣言だが本commandは未宣言(本文にSkill呼び出し明記のため非致命)
